noAgentDesc: Link an agent to automate responses
typingDelayHelp: Delay in milliseconds before the AI sends a response. Simulates human typing speed. Recommended: 1000-2000ms
stopKeywordHelp: When a user sends this keyword, the AI automation pauses for that conversation. Default: #STOP
systemPromptHelp: Instructions that define your AI's personality, behavior, and knowledge base. Be specific for better responses.
blacklistHelp: Phone numbers (with country code) that the AI will ignore. Format: +1234567890, +0987654321
webhookUrlHelp: Your n8n webhook URL that processes incoming messages and returns AI responses.
